title: Penalty on Bank of Baroda and GIC Housing Finance for Regulatory Non-Compliance
description: RBI imposed Rs 63.6 lakh penalty on Bank of Baroda for non-compliance with Fair Practices Code for Lenders and KYC norms, including collecting higher interest rates than contracted. RBI imposed Rs 3.1 lakh penalty on GIC Housing Finance Ltd for KYC violations and failure to conduct periodic risk categorisation reviews.
